allow: Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=settings.test uv run python -c "import django; django.setup\(\); from django.conf import settings; print\('OK', settings.DEBUG, settings.INSTALLED_APPS[-2:]\)")

Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=settings.production DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=x DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS=example.com DJANGO_CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS=https://example.com uv run python -c "from django.conf import settings; import django; django.setup\(\); print\('STORAGES:', getattr\(settings, 'STORAGES', None\)\); print\('STATICFILES_STORAGE attr exists:', hasattr\(settings, 'STATICFILES_STORAGE'\)\); from django.core.files.storage import default_storage; from django.contrib.staticfiles.storage import staticfiles_storage; print\('static storage:', staticfiles_storage.__class__.__module__ + '.' + staticfiles_storage.__class__.__name__\)")

Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=settings.production DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=x DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS=example.com DJANGO_CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS=https://example.com uv run python -c "import django; django.setup\(\); from django.contrib.staticfiles.storage import staticfiles_storage; print\(staticfiles_storage.__class__.__module__ + '.' + staticfiles_storage.__class__.__name__\)")
Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=settings.production DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=x DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS=example.com DJANGO_CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS=https://example.com uv run python manage.py collectstatic --noinput)

Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=settings.production DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=x DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS=example.com DJANGO_CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS=https://example.com uv run python manage.py check --deploy --fail-level WARNING)
